name: cityheaven-dto-bakusai-crawlers
description: Standalone CityHeaven, DTO.jp, and Bakusai crawlers with a local SQLite database.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/init-db.js && node -c scripts/scrape-cityheaven-v4.js && node -c scripts/scrape-dto-shop.js && node -c scripts/scrape-dto-reviews.js && node -c scripts/scrape-bakusai.js && node -c scripts/monitor-bakusai-bark.js && node -c scripts/monitor-bakusai-telegram.js
